title: Courage Cooled.
content:
I cannot love as I have lov'd before;
    For I'm grown old and, with mine age, grown poor.
    Love must be fed by wealth: this blood of mine
    Must needs wax cold, if wanting bread and wine.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Courage Cooled."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
